source_pr.title: planner: support plan digest
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
support physical plan digest. This is used for `statement table` and `slow_query`. 

### What is changed and how it works?

Add `ExplainNormalizedInfo` to `PhysicalPlan` interface.


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

Code changes

 - Has exported function/method change

Side effects

 - Possible performance regression
 - Increased code complexity
 - Breaking backward compatibility

Related changes


Release note

 - Support physical plan digest.

symptoms: fix race test: run TestParallelFlashbackTable in a serial suite (ddl/db_change_test.go)
failure_signature: fix race test: run TestParallelFlashbackTable in a serial suite (ddl/db_change_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: `TestParallelFlashbackTable` was prone to CI race issues when executed concurrently with other gocheck suite tests. The fix moves this test into a serial suite (`SerialSuites`) so it no longer runs in parallel with other tests, avoiding shared-state races under concurrent execution (especially under `-race` / higher `-p`).
fix_pattern: Move the race-prone test into a serial gocheck suite (`SerialSuites`) to avoid concurrent execution with shared state.

evidence: evidence: fix race test | sql1: "SELECT * from t1 where a!=1 order by c limit 1", (planner/core/plan_test.go)

files: ddl/db_change_test.go, executor/adapter.go, expression/explain.go, expression/expression.go, expression/util_test.go, go.sum, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/encode.go, planner/core/explain.go, planner/core/physical_plan_test.go, planner/core/plan.go, planner/core/plan_test.go, planner/core/point_get_plan.go, planner/core/testdata/plan_normalized_suite_in.json, planner/core/testdata/plan_normalized_suite_out.json, util/plancodec/codec.go
